steps.title: Identify the physical movement
steps.content: The key phrase is “tip his head back in order to see”—this shows 'tip' refers to a physical movement of the head needed to look upward at the kite.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the word
steps.content: The target meaning is to tilt or lean. 'Lean' (C) expresses this exactly—to lean your head back means to tilt it backward. Pay, instruct, and make don't describe physical movement. That matches choice C — C is correct.
